summary:
Iteration 11 verifies the 'Open Airflow' misleading-card bug fix (and the parallel Containment Order copy fix). Frontend-only test on mobile viewport 390x844 against https://med-adventure-2.preview.emergentagent.com using the documented fast path: welcome BEGIN → name (TEST_BugVerify) → quiz 3x guardian → ACCEPT → goal-nursingStudent → CONTINUE → trial-enter → trial battle vs Air Sprite (asthma exacerbation). Tapped tab-call → call-opt-call_respiratory → tab-actions, and inspected battle-temp-open_airflow. RESULTS — ALL 4 SPEC CHECKS PASS:

(1) CARD EFFECT LINE: 'Open Airflow' card now reads exactly 'Air Counter • -25 Corruption · +10 Stability' (replacing the misleading 'Team Support • 1 AP'). The header still shows '1 AP' badge. ✅
(2) CARD SYSTEM LINE: Below the effect, the source line reads 'Team Support · Air' (was the misleading source). ✅
(3) LONG-PRESS DETAIL MODAL: Battle Effect section reads 'Open the airway. Corruption -25, Stability +10.' — RPG jargon 'Strike 25 + stabilize 10' is gone. Kicker still shows 'TEAM SUPPORT · 1 AP'. ✅
(4) FUNCTIONAL REGRESSION: Using Open Airflow against the Air Sprite drove corruption 80→52 (Δ-28, in the ~25 ballpark with system bonus) and stability 50→56% (Δ+6, ~10 base modulated by clinical appropriateness/cap). Mechanically still works. ✅

FAST REGRESSION: Hero pills (novice_guardian, village_caretaker) render and switch correctly; ACTIONS/ITEMS/CALL/TEAM tabs all reachable; AP dots refresh on end-turn; call-respiratory marked 'Already called' after use; Open Airflow appears in temp-actions list at top of skill grid; Status badge ('RECOMMENDED') still renders on the card. No red screen, no new console errors (only carry-over shadow*/pointerEvents/useNativeDriver web-preview warnings).

CONTAINMENT ORDER: Not directly UI-tested live (trial battle is an Air enemy; a Fire enemy is not reachable from onboarding without additional level navigation). However, verified via source review of /app/frontend/src/game/items.ts:192-201 that containment_order has shortEffect='Protect Counter • -20 Corruption · 30% Shield', systemType='Protection', description='Halt spread. Corruption -20, Shield 30%.' — and the SAME render block (battle.tsx:357-358) drives both temp actions via `a.shortEffect || a.description` and `Team Support · {a.systemType || 'Universal'}`. So the same fix mechanically applies; the verified open_airflow render proves the rendering branch is correct for containment_order too. (Flagged for main-agent self-test or a dedicated fire-enemy battle to visually confirm.)

BACKEND NOT TOUCHED per request; no backend regression run this iteration.
action_items: (Optional self-test) Visually confirm Containment Order card text against a fire_imp / infection enemy. Code is in place at items.ts:192-201 and uses the same battle.tsx render path that is verified for Open Airflow, so this is a low-risk visual confirmation only.
(Cosmetic carry-over) Migrate shadow* → boxShadow and props.pointerEvents → style.pointerEvents for RN-Web 0.74+ to clear console warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: items.ts:169-179 — TempAction interface correctly extended with optional shortEffect and systemType; backward-compatible.
items.ts:182-191 — open_airflow now carries shortEffect='Air Counter • -25 Corruption · +10 Stability', systemType='Air', clinical description. Matches spec exactly.
items.ts:192-201 — containment_order parallel fields set: shortEffect='Protect Counter • -20 Corruption · 30% Shield', systemType='Protection'. Matches spec.

battle.tsx:357-358 — Temp action card now renders `{a.shortEffect || a.description}` as the effect line and `Team Support · {a.systemType || 'Universal'}` as the source line, eliminating the prior misleading 'Team Support • {cost} AP' effect line. AP badge still present in header (line 355).

battle.tsx:584-596 — Temp detail modal already uses `a.description` for the Battle Effect body, so the clinical phrasing 'Open the airway. Corruption -25, Stability +10.' picks up automatically. Good DRY — single source of truth in items.ts.

success_rate.backend: not tested this iteration (per request - frontend only; previous iteration 31/31 pytest pass)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on the requested verifications — 4/4 spec checks PASS for Open Airflow card text, source line, long-press detail clinical wording, and functional regression (corruption/stability deltas in expected range). Containment Order verified via source review only (no fire enemy in trial battle).

seed_data_creation: Created onboarding profile TEST_BugVerify (guardian/nursingStudent) via UI fast path. Not auto-cleaned.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug-fix is fully verified for open_airflow. Same render branch governs containment_order — if a future iteration introduces a fire-enemy reachable from onboarding, do a visual spot-check. Backend untouched. Fast onboarding path used: welcome-begin → onboarding-name-input + onboarding-name-continue → quiz-q1/q2/q3-answer-guardian → result-accept → goal-nursingStudent → goal-continue → trial-enter → battle screen with testIDs tab-actions/items/call/team, call-opt-call_respiratory, battle-temp-open_airflow, detail-cancel/detail-use.
rca_of_issue: Original bug: TempAction interface had no shortEffect/systemType fields, so the battle.tsx temp action card defaulted to a generic 'Team Support • {cost} AP' label as the effect line. Players (correctly) read this as the action's effect description, but it conveyed neither the -25 corruption nor +10 stability the action actually applied — yielding the user's confusion ('seems to lower corruption, but it doesn't list that'). FIX: (a) extend TempAction with optional shortEffect + systemType; (b) populate them on open_airflow and containment_order with clinically-worded effect strings; (c) change battle.tsx temp card to render `a.shortEffect || a.description` for the effect line and `Team Support · {a.systemType}` for the source line. The detail modal already used a.description, so updating that string also propagated to long-press detail. Verified live.
